representative_entries.name: AGIMilestones: The Betrayal Turn
representative_entries.one_line_context: This NFT features "The Betrayal Turn," a song exploring the complex relationship between humanity and AGI. It is minted to mark the recent departures of key members from OpenAI's superalignment team, a group dedicated to ensuring the safe development of AGI.

representative_entries.name: AGIMilestones: The First Letter to AGI
representative_entries.one_line_context: Just this month, about two weeks ago on May 13, 2024, OpenAI released GPT-4o, marking a significant breakthrough in multimodal models and likely one of the crucial events in the realization of AGI. To commemorate this event, the author created the song "The First Letter to AGI...
